title: InvitationData
description:
`POST /v1/workspaces/{ws}/invitations` success `data` — what the inviter pastes onward: the
workspace ADDRESS. Deliberately NOT the tokened link: the link travels only in the invitation
mail, so the inviter's receipt can never stand in for the invitee's mailbox.

address.description: The workspace address (the share link — it carries nothing; the roster is the lock).

invited.description: The emails now seated as invited members (canonical form).

mailed.description: Whether invitation mail was sent server-side (`true` only when the server can send mail).
